name: Thunder Bagua
effect_text: [Counter] Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +4000 power during this battle. Then, if you have 2 or less Life cards, add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and rest it. [Trigger] Add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and set it as active.  This card has been officially errata'd.
